comment.heading: Add a comment
comment.placeholder: Write a comment… Markdown is supported.

post.commentsOnHub: Post comments need a Hub web session — connect one in Settings → Account, or open the post on the Hub to reply.

hide.hiddenWithReason: This comment has been hidden (marked as {{reason}}).
hide.selectReason: Select a reason to hide this comment (optional):
hide.title: Hide comment
hide.warning: Hiding a comment cannot be undone. No one will be able to see its content anymore.

unwatchOpenHub: The Hub ignores Unwatch from apps — use Unwatch on their Hub page.
watchSessionExpired: The Hub ignored this watch change — your Hub web session may have expired. Reconnect it in Settings → Account.
watchSuccess: Watching — you'll get Hub notifications for this account.
watchOpenHub: The Hub ignores Watch from apps — use Watch repositories on their Hub page.
watchSyncNotApplied: Followed locally. The Hub ignores watch requests from apps — to also get Hub notifications for this account, use the Watch button on its Hub page.
